facts: BioAPEX already supports general-agent turns in the backend because selected_workflow is optional and the generic agent path runs when no workflow is selected.
The main blocker to a general biology agent experience is frontend emphasis: the composer, quick actions, and Flows navigation still make workflows feel like the primary product mode.
BioAPEX already implements several of the strongest reusable claw-code runtime ideas, including prompt context discovery with budgets, typed session blocks, and manifest-like tool policy metadata.
The right modernization move is to reposition BioAPEX as a general biology agent first while keeping explicit workflows as optional reproducible execution paths.
The best first slice is a General Biology Agent Shell: update composer copy, quick actions, and navigation emphasis before attempting deeper backend changes.
